description.en: Unlimited notes, basic organization, and real-time collaboration with up to 5 team members.
description.zh: 无限笔记，基本整理功能，最多与5名团队成员进行实时协作。

weaknesses.en: Limited customization options for advanced users
weaknesses.zh: 高级用户自定义选项有限

weaknesses.en: No explicit mention of data privacy and security measures
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明数据隐私和安全措施

targetAudience.en: Individuals and small teams looking for a simple and efficient way to organize and share notes.
targetAudience.zh: 寻找简单高效方式整理和分享笔记的个人和小型团队

positioning.en: NoteGPT positions itself as a user-friendly tool for note-taking and collaboration.
positioning.zh: NoteGPT将其定位为易于使用的笔记和协作工具
